notes: Landing page copy is grounded in the build blueprint copy_direction and the client's live site. No reviews were supplied as attributable testimonials, so the Testimonials section uses voice-of-customer themes plus a 'references on request' statement (no fabricated names or star ratings). Carrot / HSA / FSA are framed only as benefits that 'may apply' with an explicit eligibility disclaimer — never as guaranteed coverage, reimbursement, or savings.

facts.claim: Founder is Carla Rocha; 14+ years of experience caring for Bay Area families.
facts.source: Build blueprint why-nurturing-hands copy_direction; https://nurturinghandsdoulas.com (About / founder)

facts.claim: Certified, CPR-current, and background-checked doula team with reliable backup coverage.
Services: Postpartum & Recovery Support, Overnight Newborn Care, Birth Doula Support, Lactation Education & Gentle Sleep Support.
Process: free discovery call → matched with 2-3 certified doulas → interview each → choose your doula + meet backup.
Many Bay Area employers offer Carrot Fertility family-building benefits that may be used toward doula support; not an official Carrot partnership or endorsement.
Many families use pre-tax HSA/FSA funds toward doula services; eligibility varies by plan.
Serves the San Francisco Bay Area.
facts.source: Build blueprint footer / faq copy_direction; https://nurturinghandsdoulas.com

images.usage: Founder / lead caregiver portrait (Why Nurturing Hands)

images.source: On-brand image generated during scaffolding (warm doula + newborn at home); no obvious stock, matches brand palette.
